popularStory.headline: Margaret Wotton, Marchioness of Dorset
popularStory.description:
Margaret Wotton:  Marchioness of Dorset

Spouse(s): 
William Medley
 Thomas Grey, 2nd Marquess of Dorset

Issue
 George Medley
 Lady Elizabeth Grey
 Lady Katherine Grey
 Lady Anne Grey
 Henry Grey, 1s …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Wotton Marchioness of Dorset於1486年出生在英國英格蘭肯特布頓 馬爾海貝時，她的父親Sir Robert Wotton26歲，母親Lady Anne Belknap26歲。她於大約1508年與William Medley結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1535年10月6日在英國英格蘭越可爾巴沙拉爾 伊夫斯享年49歲，埋葬在英國瓦維其可爾艾斯利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Wotton Marchioness of Dorset于1486年出生在英国英格兰肯特布頓 馬爾海貝时，她的父亲Sir Robert Wotton26岁，母亲Lady Anne Belknap26岁。她于大约1508年与William Medley结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1535年10月6日在英国英格兰越可爾巴沙拉爾 伊夫斯享年49岁，埋葬在英国瓦維其可爾艾斯利。

nameMeanings.name: Wotton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Wooten
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places called with Old English wid(u), wudu ‘wood’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’, such as Wootton in Northamptonshire or Oxfordshire, Wootton Bassett in Wiltshire, Wotton in Surrey, and Wotton under Edge in Gloucestershire.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Wotton Marchioness of Dorset was born in 1486, in Boughton Malherbe, Kent, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir Robert Wotton, was 26 and her mother, Lady Anne Belknap, was 26. She married William Medley about 1508. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died on 6 October 1535, in Bashall Eaves, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 49, and was buried in Astley, Warwickshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Wotton Marchioness of Dorset est née en 1486, à Boughton Malherbe, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Robert Wotton, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Lady Anne Belknap, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé William Medley environ 1508. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée le 6 octobre 1535, à Bashall Eaves, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 49 ans, et a été enterrée à Astley, Warwickshire, Angleterre.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Wotton Marchioness of Dorset è nata il nel 1486 nel Boughton Malherbe, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir Robert Wotton, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Lady Anne Belknap, aveva 26 anni. Lei sposato William Medley circa 1508. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 6 ottobre 1535, nel Bashall Eaves, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 49 anni, e fu sepolta a Astley, Warwickshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Wotton Marchioness of Dorsetが1486年にイギリスイギリスケントボウトン マルハーベで生まれた時，父Sir Robert Wottonは26歳，母Lady Anne Belknapは26歳であった。約1508年にWilliam Medleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1535年10月6日にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアバシャル エエイベスで49歳で死去し，イギリスワーウィクシュアイアアストリーにて埋葬された。

ko.Boughton, Bocton, Malherbe, Kent, Englan: 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 부그h턴 운더 블리인
ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Wotton Marchioness of Dorset(이)가 1486년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 부그h턴 말헤르브에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Robert Wotton(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Anne Belknap(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 대략 1508년 William Medley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1535년 10월 6일 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 배샤 이브스에서 49세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 워윅실르 애스틀리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Wotton Marchioness of Dorset nasceu em 1486, em Boughton Malherbe, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Robert Wotton, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Lady Anne Belknap, tinha 26 anos. Ela casou-se com William Medley aproximadamente 1508. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 6 de outubro de 1535, em Bashall Eaves, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 49 anos, e foi sepultada em Astley, Warwickshire, Inglaterra.

ru.Boughton, Bocton, Malherbe, Kent, Englan: боугтон ундир блян, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Wotton Marchioness of Dorset родилась в 1486 г. в местности боугтон малхирб, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir Robert Wotton было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Anne Belknap, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Medley около 1508 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла 6 октября 1535 г. в местности башолл эавесь, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 49 лет и была похоронена в местности астли, варвиккшир, Англия.

Se casó con William Medley aproximadamente 1508. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 6 de octubre de 1535, en Bashall Eaves, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 49 años, y fue sepultada en Astley, Warwickshire, Inglaterra.
